export default "# 游戏开发对接文档\r\n\r\n## 📖 概述\r\n\r\n本文档说明如何将第三方游戏接入儿童游戏平台。平台采用**完全解耦**的架构，游戏独立部署，通过 **iframe** 加载，使用 **postMessage** 与平台通信。\r\n\r\n## 🎯 接入流程\r\n\r\n```\r\n1. 开发游戏 → 2. 独立部署 → 3. 平台注册 → 4. 测试对接 → 5. 上线运营\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 📦 游戏部署\r\n\r\n### 1. 游戏独立部署\r\n\r\n游戏可以是任何技术栈（Vue3、React、Phaser、Unity WebGL等），只需满足以下要求：\r\n\r\n- 单页面应用（SPA）\r\n- 通过 URL 参数接收初始化数据\r\n- 使用 postMessage 与父窗口通信\r\n- 响应式设计，适配不同屏幕\r\n\r\n### 2. 部署示例\r\n\r\n假设游戏部署到 `https://games.example.com/snake`：\r\n\r\n```\r\nhttps://games.example.com/snake/\r\n├── index.html\r\n├── game.js\r\n├── game.css\r\n└── assets/\r\n    ├── snake.png\r\n    └── food.png\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 🤝 平台对接协议\r\n\r\n### 1. 接收平台参数（URL Query）\r\n\r\n游戏启动时，平台会通过 URL 参数传递初始化数据：\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\ninterface PlatformParams {\r\n  session_id: string;      // 会话令牌（必填）\r\n  user_id: string;         // 用户ID（必填）\r\n  user_name: string;       // 用户名（必填）\r\n  game_mode: string;       // 游戏模式（可选）\r\n  game_config?: string;     // 游戏配置JSON（可选）\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n**示例 URL**：\r\n```\r\nhttps://games.example.com/snake?session_id=abc123&user_id=1&user_name=小明&game_mode=single&game_config={\"difficulty\":\"medium\",\"gridSize\":20}\r\n```\r\n\r\n**解析参数示例**：\r\n\r\n```javascript\r\nconst params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n\r\nconst sessionId = params.get('session_id');\r\nconst userId = params.get('user_id');\r\nconst userName = params.get('user_name');\r\nconst gameMode = params.get('game_mode');\r\nconst gameConfig = params.get('game_config');\r\n\r\nif (gameConfig) {\r\n  const config = JSON.parse(gameConfig);\r\n  console.log('游戏配置:', config);\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 2. 发送游戏状态（postMessage）\r\n\r\n游戏需要定期向平台发送游戏状态，以便平台更新UI：\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\ninterface GameStatusData {\r\n  score: number;           // 当前分数\r\n  duration: number;        // 游戏时长（秒）\r\n  lives?: number;          // 剩余生命（可选）\r\n  level?: number;          // 当前关卡（可选）\r\n  [key: string]: any;     // 其他自定义字段\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n**发送状态示例**：\r\n\r\n```javascript\r\n// 定义发送状态函数\r\nfunction sendGameStatus(score, duration, lives) {\r\n  window.parent.postMessage({\r\n    type: 'GAME_STATUS',\r\n    data: {\r\n      score: score,\r\n      duration: duration,\r\n      lives: lives,\r\n    }\r\n  }, '*');\r\n}\r\n\r\n// 定期发送（例如每秒）\r\nsetInterval(() => {\r\n  sendGameStatus(game.score, game.duration, game.lives);\r\n}, 1000);\r\n\r\n// 或在游戏状态变化时发送\r\ngame.onScoreChanged = (score) => {\r\n  sendGameStatus(score, game.duration, game.lives);\r\n};\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 3. 发送游戏结束（postMessage）\r\n\r\n游戏结束时，需要向平台发送最终结果：\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\ninterface GameOverData {\r\n  final_score: number;      // 最终分数（必填）\r\n  duration: number;         // 游戏时长（秒）（必填）\r\n  lives?: number;           // 剩余生命（可选）\r\n  level?: number;           // 最终关卡（可选）\r\n  is_win?: boolean;         // 是否胜利（可选）\r\n  details?: {               // 详细数据（可选）\r\n    [key: string]: any;\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n**发送结束示例**：\r\n\r\n```javascript\r\nfunction sendGameOver(result) {\r\n  window.parent.postMessage({\r\n    type: 'GAME_OVER',\r\n    data: {\r\n      final_score: result.score,\r\n      duration: result.duration,\r\n      lives: result.lives,\r\n      level: result.level,\r\n      is_win: result.isWin,\r\n      details: {\r\n        apples: result.apples,     // 吃到食物数量\r\n        max_length: result.maxLength, // 最长长度\r\n        // 其他自定义数据...\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n  }, '*');\r\n}\r\n\r\n// 游戏结束时调用\r\ngame.onGameOver = (result) => {\r\n  sendGameOver(result);\r\n};\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 4. 发送游戏错误（postMessage）\r\n\r\n游戏发生错误时，可以通知平台：\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\ninterface GameErrorData {\r\n  error_code: string;      // 错误码\r\n  error_message: string;   // 错误信息\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n**发送错误示例**：\r\n\r\n```javascript\r\nfunction sendError(errorCode, errorMessage) {\r\n  window.parent.postMessage({\r\n    type: 'GAME_ERROR',\r\n    data: {\r\n      error_code: errorCode,\r\n      error_message: errorMessage\r\n    }\r\n  }, '*');\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 5. 接收平台指令（postMessage）\r\n\r\n平台可以向游戏发送控制指令：\r\n\r\n```typescript\r\n// 暂停游戏\r\ninterface PauseGameEvent {\r\n  type: 'PAUSE_GAME';\r\n  data: { paused: boolean; };\r\n}\r\n\r\n// 继续游戏\r\ninterface ResumeGameEvent {\r\n  type: 'RESUME_GAME';\r\n  data: {};\r\n}\r\n\r\n// 强制结束\r\ninterface ForceEndGameEvent {\r\n  type: 'FORCE_END_GAME';\r\n  data: { reason: string; };\r\n}\r\n```\r\n\r\n**监听平台指令示例**：\r\n\r\n```javascript\r\n// 监听平台消息\r\nwindow.addEventListener('message', (event) => {\r\n  const { type, data } = event.data;\r\n\r\n  switch (type) {\r\n    case 'PAUSE_GAME':\r\n      if (data.paused) {\r\n        game.pause();\r\n      }\r\n      break;\r\n\r\n    case 'RESUME_GAME':\r\n      game.resume();\r\n      break;\r\n\r\n    case 'FORCE_END_GAME':\r\n      game.end(data.reason);\r\n      break;\r\n\r\n    default:\r\n      console.log('未知消息类型:', type);\r\n  }\r\n});\r\n\r\n// 游戏暂停处理\r\ngame.onPause = () => {\r\n  console.log('游戏已暂停');\r\n  // 可以显示暂停UI\r\n};\r\n\r\n// 游戏继续处理\r\ngame.onResume = () => {\r\n  console.log('游戏已继续');\r\n  // 隐藏暂停UI\r\n};\r\n\r\n// 游戏结束处理\r\ngame.onEnd = (reason) => {\r\n  console.log('游戏结束:', reason);\r\n  sendGameOver(game.getFinalResult());\r\n};\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 🎮 完整示例代码\r\n\r\n### HTML + JavaScript 示例\r\n\r\n```html\r\n<!DOCTYPE html>\r\n<html lang=\"zh-CN\">\r\n<head>\r\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\">\r\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\">\r\n  <title>贪吃蛇游戏</title>\r\n  <style>\r\n    * {\r\n      margin: 0;\r\n      padding: 0;\r\n      box-sizing: border-box;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    body {\r\n      display: flex;\r\n      justify-content: center;\r\n      align-items: center;\r\n      height: 100vh;\r\n      background: #000;\r\n      font-family: Arial, sans-serif;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    #game-container {\r\n      position: relative;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    canvas {\r\n      border: 2px solid #42b983;\r\n      background: #1a1a1a;\r\n      display: block;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    .game-info {\r\n      color: #fff;\r\n      text-align: center;\r\n      margin-bottom: 10px;\r\n    }\r\n  </style>\r\n</head>\r\n<body>\r\n  <div id=\"game-container\">\r\n    <div class=\"game-info\">\r\n      <span id=\"score\">分数: 0</span> | \r\n      <span id=\"duration\">时长: 0s</span> |\r\n      <span id=\"lives\">生命: 3</span>\r\n    </div>\r\n    <canvas id=\"gameCanvas\"></canvas>\r\n  </div>\r\n\r\n  <script>\r\n    // ==================== 配置和状态 ====================\r\n    \r\n    // 解析平台参数\r\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n    const sessionId = params.get('session_id');\r\n    const userId = params.get('user_id');\r\n    const userName = params.get('user_name');\r\n    const gameConfigStr = params.get('game_config');\r\n    \r\n    // 游戏配置\r\n    let gameConfig = {\r\n      difficulty: 'medium',\r\n      gridSize: 20,\r\n      initialSpeed: 150,\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    if (gameConfigStr) {\r\n      try {\r\n        gameConfig = { ...gameConfig, ...JSON.parse(gameConfigStr) };\r\n      } catch (e) {\r\n        console.error('解析游戏配置失败:', e);\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // 游戏状态\r\n    const gameState = {\r\n      score: 0,\r\n      duration: 0,\r\n      lives: 3,\r\n      isPaused: false,\r\n      isGameOver: false,\r\n      apples: 0,\r\n      maxLength: 3,\r\n      startTime: Date.now(),\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    // ==================== 工具函数 ====================\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 发送游戏状态到平台\r\n     */\r\n    function sendGameStatus() {\r\n      window.parent.postMessage({\r\n        type: 'GAME_STATUS',\r\n        data: {\r\n          score: gameState.score,\r\n          duration: gameState.duration,\r\n          lives: gameState.lives,\r\n        }\r\n      }, '*');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 发送游戏结束到平台\r\n     */\r\n    function sendGameOver() {\r\n      window.parent.postMessage({\r\n        type: 'GAME_OVER',\r\n        data: {\r\n          final_score: gameState.score,\r\n          duration: gameState.duration,\r\n          lives: gameState.lives,\r\n          details: {\r\n            apples: gameState.apples,\r\n            max_length: gameState.maxLength,\r\n          }\r\n        }\r\n      }, '*');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 发送游戏错误\r\n     */\r\n    function sendError(errorCode, errorMessage) {\r\n      window.parent.postMessage({\r\n        type: 'GAME_ERROR',\r\n        data: {\r\n          error_code: errorCode,\r\n          error_message: errorMessage\r\n        }\r\n      }, '*');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新UI\r\n     */\r\n    function updateUI() {\r\n      document.getElementById('score').textContent = `分数: ${gameState.score}`;\r\n      document.getElementById('duration').textContent = `时长: ${gameState.duration}s`;\r\n      document.getElementById('lives').textContent = `生命: ${gameState.lives}`;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // ==================== 游戏逻辑 ====================\r\n    \r\n    const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');\r\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\r\n    const gridSize = gameConfig.gridSize;\r\n    const canvasWidth = 400;\r\n    const canvasHeight = 400;\r\n    \r\n    canvas.width = canvasWidth;\r\n    canvas.height = canvasHeight;\r\n    \r\n    // 蛇\r\n    let snake = [\r\n      { x: 10, y: 10 },\r\n      { x: 9, y: 10 },\r\n      { x: 8, y: 10 },\r\n    ];\r\n    \r\n    let direction = { x: 1, y: 0 };\r\n    let food = { x: 15, y: 15 };\r\n    let gameLoop;\r\n    let statusInterval;\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 生成食物\r\n     */\r\n    function spawnFood() {\r\n      const maxX = canvasWidth / gridSize - 1;\r\n      const maxY = canvasHeight / gridSize - 1;\r\n      food = {\r\n        x: Math.floor(Math.random() * maxX),\r\n        y: Math.floor(Math.random() * maxY),\r\n      };\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 绘制游戏\r\n     */\r\n    function draw() {\r\n      // 清空画布\r\n      ctx.fillStyle = '#1a1a1a';\r\n      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvasWidth, canvasHeight);\r\n      \r\n      // 绘制食物\r\n      ctx.fillStyle = '#ff4444';\r\n      ctx.fillRect(food.x * gridSize, food.y * gridSize, gridSize - 2, gridSize - 2);\r\n      \r\n      // 绘制蛇\r\n      snake.forEach((segment, index) => {\r\n        ctx.fillStyle = index === 0 ? '#00ff00' : '#42b983';\r\n        ctx.fillRect(segment.x * gridSize, segment.y * gridSize, gridSize - 2, gridSize - 2);\r\n      });\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 更新游戏状态\r\n     */\r\n    function update() {\r\n      if (gameState.isPaused || gameState.isGameOver) {\r\n        return;\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      // 移动蛇\r\n      const head = { ...snake[0] };\r\n      head.x += direction.x;\r\n      head.y += direction.y;\r\n      \r\n      // 边界检测\r\n      if (head.x < 0 || head.x >= canvasWidth / gridSize ||\r\n          head.y < 0 || head.y >= canvasHeight / gridSize) {\r\n        loseLife();\r\n        return;\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      // 自身碰撞检测\r\n      for (let segment of snake) {\r\n        if (head.x === segment.x && head.y === segment.y) {\r\n          loseLife();\r\n          return;\r\n        }\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      snake.unshift(head);\r\n      \r\n      // 吃食物\r\n      if (head.x === food.x && head.y === food.y) {\r\n        gameState.score += 10;\r\n        gameState.apples++;\r\n        spawnFood();\r\n        updateUI();\r\n        sendGameStatus();\r\n      } else {\r\n        snake.pop();\r\n      }\r\n      \r\n      // 更新最长长度\r\n      if (snake.length > gameState.maxLength) {\r\n        gameState.maxLength = snake.length;\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 失去生命\r\n     */\r\n    function loseLife() {\r\n      gameState.lives--;\r\n      updateUI();\r\n      \r\n      if (gameState.lives <= 0) {\r\n        gameOver();\r\n      } else {\r\n        // 重置蛇的位置\r\n        snake = [\r\n          { x: 10, y: 10 },\r\n          { x: 9, y: 10 },\r\n          { x: 8, y: 10 },\r\n        ];\r\n        direction = { x: 1, y: 0 };\r\n        spawnFood();\r\n      }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 游戏结束\r\n     */\r\n    function gameOver() {\r\n      gameState.isGameOver = true;\r\n      clearInterval(gameLoop);\r\n      clearInterval(statusInterval);\r\n      \r\n      sendGameOver();\r\n      \r\n      // 显示游戏结束信息\r\n      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8)';\r\n      ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvasWidth, canvasHeight);\r\n      ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';\r\n      ctx.font = '30px Arial';\r\n      ctx.textAlign = 'center';\r\n      ctx.fillText('游戏结束', canvasWidth / 2, canvasHeight / 2);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 暂停游戏\r\n     */\r\n    function pauseGame() {\r\n      gameState.isPaused = true;\r\n      console.log('游戏暂停');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 继续游戏\r\n     */\r\n    function resumeGame() {\r\n      gameState.isPaused = false;\r\n      console.log('游戏继续');\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    /**\r\n     * 强制结束\r\n     */\r\n    function forceEndGame(reason) {\r\n      console.log('强制结束:', reason);\r\n      gameState.isGameOver = true;\r\n      clearInterval(gameLoop);\r\n      clearInterval(statusInterval);\r\n      sendGameOver();\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // ==================== 游戏循环 ====================\r\n    \r\n    function startGame() {\r\n      spawnFood();\r\n      \r\n      // 游戏循环（60fps）\r\n      gameLoop = setInterval(() => {\r\n        update();\r\n        draw();\r\n      }, 1000 / 60);\r\n      \r\n      // 状态更新（每秒）\r\n      statusInterval = setInterval(() => {\r\n        if (!gameState.isPaused && !gameState.isGameOver) {\r\n          gameState.duration = Math.floor((Date.now() - gameState.startTime) / 1000);\r\n          updateUI();\r\n          sendGameStatus();\r\n        }\r\n      }, 1000);\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // ==================== 键盘控制 ====================\r\n    \r\n    document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {\r\n      if (gameState.isPaused || gameState.isGameOver) return;\r\n      \r\n      switch (e.key) {\r\n        case 'ArrowUp':\r\n        case 'w':\r\n        case 'W':\r\n          if (direction.y !== 1) direction = { x: 0, y: -1 };\r\n          break;\r\n        case 'ArrowDown':\r\n        case 's':\r\n        case 'S':\r\n          if (direction.y !== -1) direction = { x: 0, y: 1 };\r\n          break;\r\n        case 'ArrowLeft':\r\n        case 'a':\r\n        case 'A':\r\n          if (direction.x !== 1) direction = { x: -1, y: 0 };\r\n          break;\r\n        case 'ArrowRight':\r\n        case 'd':\r\n        case 'D':\r\n          if (direction.x !== -1) direction = { x: 1, y: 0 };\r\n          break;\r\n      }\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    // ==================== 监听平台指令 ====================\r\n    \r\n    window.addEventListener('message', (event) => {\r\n      const { type, data } = event.data;\r\n      \r\n      switch (type) {\r\n        case 'PAUSE_GAME':\r\n          pauseGame();\r\n          break;\r\n          \r\n        case 'RESUME_GAME':\r\n          resumeGame();\r\n          break;\r\n          \r\n        case 'FORCE_END_GAME':\r\n          forceEndGame(data.reason);\r\n          break;\r\n      }\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    // ==================== 启动游戏 ====================\r\n    \r\n    console.log('游戏初始化:', {\r\n      sessionId,\r\n      userId,\r\n      userName,\r\n      gameConfig\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    startGame();\r\n  </script>\r\n</body>\r\n</html>\r\n```\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 🔧 平台注册\r\n\r\n### 1. 登录后台管理系统\r\n\r\n使用管理员账号登录平台后台。\r\n\r\n### 2. 添加游戏\r\n\r\n在游戏管理页面，点击\"添加游戏\"，填写以下信息：\r\n\r\n| 字段 | 说明 | 示例 |\r\n|------|------|------|\r\n| 游戏代码 | 唯一标识 | `SNAKE_VUE3` |\r\n| 游戏名称 | 显示名称 | 贪吃蛇大冒险 |\r\n| 游戏分类 | 所属分类 | 益智 |\r\n| 适龄阶段 | 适合年级 | 一年级 |\r\n| 图标URL | 游戏图标 | `/images/games/snake-icon.png` |\r\n| 游戏URL | **独立部署地址** | `https://games.example.com/snake` |\r\n| 游戏密钥 | 签名验证（可选） | `snake_secret_123` |\r\n| 游戏配置 | JSON配置 | `{\"difficulty\":\"medium\",\"gridSize\":20}` |\r\n| 状态 | 启用/禁用 | 启用 |\r\n\r\n### 3. 测试游戏\r\n\r\n1. 在前端平台点击游戏卡片\r\n2. 确认游戏正常加载\r\n3. 测试游戏流程（开始、暂停、继续、结束）\r\n4. 检查分数、时长、生命值是否正确更新\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## ⚠️ 注意事项\r\n\r\n### 安全性\r\n\r\n1. **消息来源验证**：平台会验证 postMessage 来源，游戏不需要处理\r\n2. **会话令牌**：不要将 `session_id` 暴露给第三方\r\n3. **CORS 配置**：确保游戏服务器允许平台域名的跨域请求\r\n\r\n### 兼容性\r\n\r\n1. **postMessage**：所有现代浏览器都支持\r\n2. **URL 参数**：使用标准的 URLSearchParams API\r\n3. **响应式**：游戏需要适配不同屏幕尺寸\r\n\r\n### 性能\r\n\r\n1. **状态更新频率**：建议每秒发送一次状态\r\n2. **静态资源**：建议使用 CDN 加速\r\n3. **代码压缩**：发布前压缩 JS/CSS 代码\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 🐛 故障排查\r\n\r\n### 问题 1：游戏无法加载\r\n\r\n**可能原因**：\r\n- 游戏URL配置错误\r\n- CORS 未配置\r\n- 游戏服务器未启动\r\n\r\n**解决方法**：\r\n1. 检查数据库 `t_game` 表的 `game_url` 字段\r\n2. 配置游戏服务器的 CORS\r\n3. 确认游戏服务器正常运行\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 问题 2：postMessage 未生效\r\n\r\n**可能原因**：\r\n- 消息类型不匹配\r\n- 游戏在 iframe 中运行\r\n\r\n**解决方法**：\r\n1. 检查消息类型是否为 `GAME_STATUS`、`GAME_OVER` 等\r\n2. 确保游戏在 iframe 中运行\r\n3. 使用浏览器开发者工具查看 postMessage 事件\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n### 问题 3：游戏结果未提交\r\n\r\n**可能原因**：\r\n- `session_id` 未传递\r\n- 后端接口未正确调用\r\n\r\n**解决方法**：\r\n1. 检查 URL 参数是否包含 `session_id`\r\n2. 在浏览器开发者工具查看网络请求\r\n3. 确认后端 `/api/game/session/{sessionId}/result` 接口正常\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 📚 相关资源\r\n\r\n- [完整架构设计文档](GAME_PLATFORM_DECOUPLING_DESIGN.md)\r\n- [实施指南](IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md)\r\n- [API 接口文档](API_REFERENCE.md)（待完善）\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 💡 最佳实践\r\n\r\n1. **定期发送状态**：每秒发送一次游戏状态，保证 UI 实时更新\r\n2. **异常处理**：所有网络操作都要有异常处理\r\n3. **用户反馈**：游戏加载、错误时要有明确的用户提示\r\n4. **日志记录**：使用 console.log 记录关键操作，方便调试\r\n5. **测试覆盖**：测试各种场景（正常、异常、网络问题等）\r\n\r\n---\r\n\r\n## 📞 技术支持\r\n\r\n如遇到对接问题，请联系平台技术团队：\r\n- Email: support@kids-game.com\r\n- QQ群: 123456789\r\n"
